name: Tap Tricks
author: Poki
description: Tap Tricks is an arcade skating game developed by Gesinimo Games. Maintain your jump and release it at the right timing to launch tricks and figures ! Let the flow of the game take over in this explosive skate board adventure. Go ahead and demonstrate the power of your skate ! How to play: Hold and tap the screen to trigger actions About the creator: Tap Tricks is created by Gesinimo Games. This is their first game on Poki !
